defs: A strip of red cloth notched like the comb of a cock, which licensed jesters formerly wore in their caps.
The top of the head, or the head itself
quotes: We will belabor you a little better, And beat a little more care into your coxcombs.

defs: A vain, showy fellow; a conceited, silly man, fond of display; a superficial pretender to knowledge or accomplishments; a fop.
quotes: Fond to be seen, she kept a bevy Of powdered coxcombs at her levee.
Some are bewildered in the maze of schools, And some made coxcombs, nature meant but fools.

defs: A name given to several plants of different genera, but particularly to Celosia cristata, or garden cockscomb. Same as Cockscomb.
